title: Blåhaj: Legacy
description: Another migrated version of Blåhaj! Hold Blåhaj together in 1.7.10!
body:
Another migrated version of [Blåhaj](https://modrinth.com/mod/blahaj)! Now hold Blåhaj together in 1.7.10!
And now 1.12.2 is coming!

In 1.7.10 should Lib [Unimixins](https://modrinth.com/mod/unimixins).
In 1.12.2 should Lib [MixinBootstrap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mixinbootstrap) (NoMixin Only!)

This mod 's code is under the [Pineapple License](https://github.com/AmarokIce/Blahaj-Legacy/blob/master/LICENSE.txt), while the asset files belonged to the [The Unlicense](https://github.com/hibiii/Blahaj/blob/main/LICENSE) of the original work. You can distribute without any permission.
